source: Aggregated from trade-press RSS (gCaptain, Splash247, Maritime Executive, Hellenic Shipping News, OilPrice)

outages.headline: Samskip Receives Approval for the Transfer of its Door-to-Door and Quay-to-Quay Services Connecting Rotterdam with the UK and Ireland and Enters a New Chapter Focused on Customer Value and Reliability
outages.summary: The operational transfer of these services is scheduled to take place on the 29th of June as part of the planned transition process. Until then, Samskip and CLdN will continue working closely together to ensure the transition is managed carefully and with minimal disruption for customers, suppliers, and all parties involved. The transaction relates specifically ...
